message:
feat: Add Requesty.ai provider integration with 300+ models

Implements full Requesty.ai support as a new provider option alongside
Anthropic, OpenRouter, Gemini, and ONNX. Provides access to 300+ models
through Requesty's unified API with 95% cost savings.

Key Features:
- New AnthropicToRequestyProxy class for API translation
- CLI support with --provider requesty flag
- Environment variable REQUESTY_API_KEY configuration
- USE_REQUESTY=true for automatic provider selection
- max_tokens capping at 8192 for OpenAI model compatibility
- Native tool support detection for GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, GPT-4-turbo
- Seamless integration with existing agent execution flow

Technical Details:
- Base URL: https://router.requesty.ai/v1
- Default model: deepseek/deepseek-chat (native tool support)
- 95% code reuse from OpenRouter implementation
- Bearer token authentication
- OpenAI-compatible API format
- Streaming and tool calling support

Files Changed:
- src/proxy/anthropic-to-requesty.ts (NEW, 750 lines)
- src/cli-proxy.ts (+110 lines for Requesty support)
- src/agents/claudeAgent.ts (+19 lines for provider config)
- src/utils/modelCapabilities.ts (+23 lines for OpenAI models)

Testing:
✅ Validated with DeepSeek Chat returning correct results
✅ Tested max_tokens capping functionality
✅ Verified API endpoint and authentication
✅ Confirmed CLI integration working

Closes #10

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
